title: chamomilla officinalis
intro: Chamomilla officinalis, also known as German chamomile, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Chamomilla officinalis lie in its ability to soothe and calm the mind and body, which is attributed to its high levels of apigenin and luteolin, flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Chamomilla officinalis include reducing anxiety and insomnia, alleviating menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms, and promoting relaxation and better sleep quality. Chamomilla officinalis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
